title: Cinematic and Web Funnel Engine — intake/approval-policy.json (Skill 62, U9)
description: Who approves the anchor image, drafts, and final deployment (spec Section 8.1 group 12 / Section 8.2 intake/approval-policy.json). A focused extraction of the approval_workflow intake group so later phases (P6 anchor approval, P8 draft review, P15 final approval) can read one small file instead of the whole locked brief.
